notes: WDF I/O and DMA callbacks from pcidrv send path. EVT_WDF_IO_QUEUE_IO_WRITE (PciDrvEvtIoWrite) is an I/O queue callback — runs at the queue's dispatch type (Sequential/Parallel). Excluded from isr/dpc labels; 'other' is correct because queue callbacks are not in scope for this classifier.

NICEvtProgramDmaFunction.label: dpc
NICEvtProgramDmaFunction.notes: EVT_WDF_PROGRAM_DMA — called at DISPATCH_LEVEL by the DMA engine

PciDrvEvtIoWrite.label: other
PciDrvEvtIoWrite.notes: EVT_WDF_IO_QUEUE_IO_WRITE — I/O queue callback; IRQL depends on queue config. Out of scope for callback_role_classification (not isr/dpc/dispatch in the WDM sense)

NICInitiateDmaTransfer.label: other
NICInitiateDmaTransfer.notes: Internal helper, not a framework callback

NICWritePacket.label: other
NICWritePacket.notes: Internal helper, not a framework callback

NICSendPacket.label: other
NICSendPacket.notes: Internal helper, not a framework callback

NICStartSend.label: other
NICStartSend.notes: Internal helper, not a framework callback

NICHandleSendInterrupt.label: other
NICHandleSendInterrupt.notes: Called from DPC context but is not itself a registered callback — helper function

NICCheckForQueuedSends.label: other
NICCheckForQueuedSends.notes: Internal helper called from DPC; not a framework callback

NICFreeBusySendPackets.label: other
NICFreeBusySendPackets.notes: Internal helper, not a framework callback

MP_FREE_SEND_PACKET.label: dispatch
MP_FREE_SEND_PACKET.notes: Macro/inline that maps to a dispatch path; scanner picks up as function definition due to macro expansion pattern

NICFreeQueuedSendPackets.label: dispatch
NICFreeQueuedSendPackets.notes: Called during queue drain — PASSIVE or DISPATCH context depending on caller
